# Sora
> Practice live technical interviews with Big Tech software engineers.

Sora is a platform for software engineers to practice real-time technical interviews. Unlike automated platforms, Sora connects you with verified engineers from top-tier companies like Google, Amazon, and Meta for live, interactive sessions.

## Key Features
- **Live Peer-to-Peer Environment**: Shared code editor with real-time syncing.
- **Story-Driven Practice**: Unique DSA challenges presented as interactive narrative adventures.
- **AI Forensics**: Automated post-interview analysis on time complexity, space complexity, and coding patterns.

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://sorabuild.netlify.app/): Main platform overview.
- [Guidelines](https://sorabuild.netlify.app/guidelines): How the interview platform works.
- [Sign Up](https://sorabuild.netlify.app/signup): Register for early access.
